applied_updates.description: credit_score is a critical data element for underwriting and capital reserves; tightened policy null-rate threshold to <= 3% for FY26.

rule.description: credit_score is a critical data element for underwriting and capital reserves; tightened policy null-rate threshold to <= 3% for FY26.
rule.sql_query: SELECT 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN credit_score IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE report_date = :snapshot_date
